{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Software Developer",
  "description": "Transkredit was birthed to address a gap in financial inclusion, in line with the Maya Declaration; a global initiative for responsible and sustainable financial inclusion that aims to reduce poverty and ensure financial stability for the benefit of all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Developer

Job Location: 14B Lingu Crescent, Wuse II - Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a skilled and self-driven Software Developer to join our engineering team. In this role, you will take ownership of designing, building, and maintaining scalable backend services and web applications that power our core products.
	You will work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high quality software solutions and contribute meaningfully to our technical direction.
	This is a hands-on role for someone who is comfortable working across the stack, writes clean production grade code, and thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.


Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain robust backend APIs and services.
	Build and improve scalable, performant web applications with React on the frontend.
	Architect and implement new features end-to-end, from requirements through deployment.
	Write clean, well-tested, and thoroughly documented code following engineering best practices.
	Conduct and participate in code reviews, upholding high standards of code quality across the team.
	Debug and resolve complex issues across the full stack in a timely manner.
	Collaborate with product, design, and senior engineering stakeholders to define and deliver technical solutions.
	Contribute to system design discussions and help evaluate architectural trade-offs.
	Maintain and improve CI/CD pipelines and support deployment processes.
	Produce clear, comprehensive API and system documentation.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: recruitment@transkreditfinance.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-21",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Transkredit Finance Company"
    
  },

Software Developer Job at Transkredit Finance Company




        
    

        
        Transkredit was birthed to address a gap in financial inclusion, in line with the Maya Declaration; a global initiative for responsible and sustainable financial inclusion that aims to reduce poverty and ensure financial stability for the benefit of all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Developer

Job Location: 14B Lingu Crescent, Wuse II - Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a skilled and self-driven Software Developer to join our engineering team. In this role, you will take ownership of designing, building, and maintaining scalable backend services and web applications that power our core products.
	You will work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high quality software solutions and contribute meaningfully to our technical direction.
	This is a hands-on role for someone who is comfortable working across the stack, writes clean production grade code, and thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.


Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain robust backend APIs and services.
	Build and improve scalable, performant web applications with React on the frontend.
	Architect and implement new features end-to-end, from requirements through deployment.
	Write clean, well-tested, and thoroughly documented code following engineering best practices.
	Conduct and participate in code reviews, upholding high standards of code quality across the team.
	Debug and resolve complex issues across the full stack in a timely manner.
	Collaborate with product, design, and senior engineering stakeholders to define and deliver technical solutions.
	Contribute to system design discussions and help evaluate architectural trade-offs.
	Maintain and improve CI/CD pipelines and support deployment processes.
	Produce clear, comprehensive API and system documentation.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior PR Manager",
  "description": "Transsion Holdings, the company formerly known as TECNO TELECOM LIMITED, established in July 2006, is a high-tech company specializing in the R&amp;D, production, sale and service of mobile communication products. After years of development, Transsion has become an important part of the mobile phone industry and one of the major mobile phone manufacturers in the world. Currently, it has full ownership of three famous mobile phone brands TECNO, itel and Infinix, and an after-sales service brand Carlcare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior PR Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
PR Strategy Development &amp; Execution:


	Independently develop, break down, and implement communication strategies aligned with corporate objectives; own the impact on brand reputation and communication effectiveness.
	Lead the planning and execution of integrated online-to-offline campaigns, including but not limited to: brand launches, industry exhibitions, and cross-sector collaborative events.


Government &amp; Media Relations:


	Cultivate and expand a robust network of core media contacts and relevant government stakeholders, establishing long-term, trust-based communication channels.
	Independently drive high-quality media collaborations, such as in-depth interviews, content co-creation, and agenda-setting initiatives.
	Rapidly respond to and adeptly manage public opinion and crisis communication situations.


Cross-Industry Synergy &amp; Resource Integration:


	Proactively identify and facilitate cross-brand collaboration opportunities, designing partnerships and event-driven campaigns with viral, boundary-breaking appeal.
	Oversee the end-to-end execution of large-scale projects like trade shows and pop-up activations, ensuring experience design remains seamlessly aligned with brand identity.


AI-Powered Workflow Optimization:


	Skillfully leverage AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Midjourney, etc.) to augment daily PR work, including:
	Rapid drafting and polishing of high-quality press releases, speeches, and social copy;
	Brainstorming and visual concept mockups during the creative planning phase;
	Aggregating sentiment data, extracting insights, and supporting data-informed decisions.
	Continuously explore new AI applications across PR scenarios, driving the evolution of the team&#39;s working methods


Industry Insight &amp; Strategic Counsel


	Closely monitor industry trends, policy shifts, and competitor communications; regularly deliver market insight reports to inform management strategy.


Qualifications
Background &amp; Experience (meet at least one of the following):


	5+ years of experience as a PR Manager or equivalent role in a large-scale enterprise, with a proven, well-rounded portfolio of projects.
	Senior Account Manager, Project Lead, or above in a reputable PR/advertising agency, having deeply served major brand clients.


Resources &amp; Track Record (mandatory):


	Demonstrable relationships with relevant government bodies and key media; able to cite specific examples of successfully facilitating critical cooperation or defusing public sentiment.
	A track record of leading cross-industry brand alliances, or orchestrating integrated marketing projects encompassing offline exhibitions and large-scale launch events.


Core Competencies:


	Capable of handling the full chain &mdash; from strategy and copywriting to on-site execution &mdash; without heavy reliance on support; thrives in ambiguous situations and proactively finds solutions.
	Keen sensitivity to industry shifts, public mood, and changes in the communication landscape; adept at rapidly translating insights into communication opportunities.
	Proactively embeds AI tools into daily workflows, viewing them as a default lever for enhancing creative quality and execution efficiency &mdash; not as an afterthought. Candidates who can share concrete use cases and efficiency gains are preferred.


Salary
N700,000 - N1,000,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their send their Resume to: oyeleke.adebimpe@transsion.com using &quot;Senior PR manager&quot; as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-14",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-22",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Transsion Holdings"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {

Senior PR Manager Job at Transsion Holdings




        
    

        
        Transsion Holdings, the company formerly known as TECNO TELECOM LIMITED, established in July 2006, is a high-tech company specializing in the R&D, production, sale and service of mobile communication products. After years of development, Transsion has become an important part of the mobile phone industry and one of the major mobile phone manufacturers in the world. Currently, it has full ownership of three famous mobile phone brands TECNO, itel and Infinix, and an after-sales service brand Carlcare.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior PR Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Key Responsibilities
PR Strategy Development & Execution:


	Independently develop, break down, and implement communication strategies aligned with corporate objectives; own the impact on brand reputation and communication effectiveness.
	Lead the planning and execution of integrated online-to-offline campaigns, including but not limited to: brand launches, industry exhibitions, and cross-sector collaborative events.


Government & Media Relations:


	Cultivate and expand a robust network of core media contacts and relevant government stakeholders, establishing long-term, trust-based communication channels.
	Independently drive high-quality media collaborations, such as in-depth interviews, content co-creation, and agenda-setting initiatives.
	Rapidly respond to and adeptly manage public opinion and crisis communication situations.


Cross-Industry Synergy & Resource Integration:


	Proactively identify and facilitate cross-brand collaboration opportunities, designing partnerships and event-driven campaigns with viral, boundary-breaking appeal.
	Oversee the end-to-end execution of large-scale projects like trade shows and pop-up activations, ensuring experience design remains seamlessly aligned with brand identity.


AI-Powered Workflow Optimization:


	Skillfully leverage AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Midjourney, etc.) to augment daily PR work, including:
	Rapid drafting and polishing of high-quality press releases, speeches, and social copy;
	Brainstorming and visual concept mockups during the creative planning phase;
	Aggregating sentiment data, extracting insights, and supporting data-informed decisions.
	Continuously explore new AI applications across PR scenarios, driving the evolution of the team's working methods


Industry Insight & Strategic Counsel


	Closely monitor industry trends, policy shifts, and competitor communications; regularly deliver market insight reports to inform management strategy.


Qualifications
Background & Experience (meet at least one of the following):


	5+ years of experience as a PR Manager or equivalent role in a large-scale enterprise, with a proven, well-rounded portfolio of projects.
	Senior Account Manager, Project Lead, or above in a reputable PR/advertising agency, having deeply served major brand clients.


Resources & Track Record (mandatory):


	Demonstrable relationships with relevant government bodies and key media; able to cite specific examples of successfully facilitating critical cooperation or defusing public sentiment.
	A track record of leading cross-industry brand alliances, or orchestrating integrated marketing projects encompassing offline exhibitions and large-scale launch events.


Core Competencies:


	Capable of handling the full chain — from strategy and copywriting to on-site execution — without heavy reliance on support; thrives in ambiguous situations and proactively finds solutions.
	Keen sensitivity to industry shifts, public mood, and changes in the communication landscape; adept at rapidly translating insights into communication opportunities.
	Proactively embeds AI tools into daily workflows, viewing them as a default lever for enhancing creative quality and execution efficiency — not as an afterthought. Candidates who can share concrete use cases and efficiency gains are preferred.


Salary
N700,000 - N1,000,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their send their Resume to: [email protected] using "Senior PR manager" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

General Manager Job at STS Worldwide Shipping




        
    

        
        STS Worldwide Shipping is a logistics and freight forwarding company that provides end-to-end shipping solutions, including sea, air, and land transportation, customs clearance, warehousing, and supply chain management. The company has a presence in Lagos, Port Harcourt, and Abuja, with its roots tracing back to Houston, Texas.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: General Manager

Job Location:  Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Oversee daily business operations and ensure efficiency
	Develop and implement company-wide strategies for growth
	Supervise department heads and ensure alignment with objectives
	Monitor financial performance, budgets, and cost control
	Drive business development and strategic partnerships
	Ensure compliance with company policies and standards
	Manage staff performance and organizational productivity
	Report operational and strategic performance to top management


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, Economics, or related field (Master’s is an added advantage)
	8–12 years relevant experience in senior management or leadership roles
	Strong leadership, strategic thinking, and decision-making skills
	Experience in operations, business development, or logistics is an advantage
	Excellent communication, financial, and analytical skills
	Ability to manage teams and drive performance in a fast-paced environment.


Salary
N900,000 - N1,000,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

	We are currently recruiting experienced Realtors.

Realtor Job at L’evolute Properties




        
    

        
        L’evolute Properties is a real estate company located in Lagos Nigeria that sells properties, personal, commercial, landed.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Realtor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are currently recruiting experienced Realtors.
	This opportunity is open to both in-house and external Realtors with proven experience in real estate sales.


Requirement
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with relevant experience and a strong understanding of property transactions.

And
Click here to apply online

Note


	Only applicants with relevant experience and a strong understanding of property transactions will be considered.

title: Job Vacancies at Gbenga Badejo & Co.
content:
Gbenga Badejo and Co. - Our clients in various sectors are currently recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the following positions below:

1.) Bookkeeper

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Essential Duties and Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records (general ledger, journals, and subsidiary ledgers)
	Record daily financial transactions (sales, purchases, receipts, payments)
	Manage accounts payable and receivable
	Prepare bank reconciliation statement
	Prepare trial balances and assist in month-end and year-end procedures
	Generate financial reports (profit & loss, balance sheet, cash flow)
	Operate and manage accounting systems such as QuickBooks, Sage, SAP.
	Configure chart of accounts and accounting workflows within the software
	Ensure accurate data entry and system integrity
	Perform software updates, backups, and basic troubleshooting
	Use spreadsheets (Excel, Google Sheets) for financial analysis, forecasting, and reconciliations
	Maintain digital filing systems and ensure secure data storage
	Implement and monitor internal controls within IT systems.


Education and Experience


	A Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting or related courses from a reputable educational institution.
	A minimum of 3 years of experience working as a Book Keeper or in similar role.
	Knowledgeable in the use of ERP like QuickBooks, Sage, Zoho, SAP etc.
	Outstanding organizational and time management skills.
	Familiarity with office gadgets and IT applications.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Ability to use discretion and maintain confidentiality.
	Membership of AAT will be an added advantage.
	Applicants residing on the mainland are preferred.


Compensation


	This is a full-time role with competitive salary.


Application Closing Date: 4th June, 2026.

Click here to apply online




Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

 

2.) Tax Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities and Competencies


	Prepare and file tax returns accurately and within statutory deadlines.
	Calculate and remit taxes such as VAT, PAYE, Withholding Tax (WHT), and Company Income Tax.
	Ensure the organization complies with tax regulations from authorities like Nigeria Revenue Service(NRS) and Lagos Internal Revenue Service (LIRS).
	Maintain proper tax documentation and records for audit purposes.
	Handle tax audits and respond to tax authority queries.
	Perform tax reconciliations to ensure payments are properly recorded.
	Monitor changes in tax laws and regulations and advise management accordingly.
	Support tax planning strategies to legally minimize tax liabilities
	Practical experience with tax filings (VAT, PAYE, Withholding Tax) and financial audits is required.
	Experience dealing with tax authorities such as the Nigeria Revenue Service (NRS), Lagos Internal Revenue Service (LIRS)is an added advantage.
	Proven track record of managingmultiple client engagementssimultaneously.
	Experience withtax auditsandresolutions
	Ability toreview complex tax returns and workpapersfor accuracy and technical soundness.


Requirements
Experience


	Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance or related
	3–5 years of experience tax compliance, or accounting roles.
	Relevant professional certification (ICAN/ACCA/CITN) is required.


Application Closing Date: 19th May, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

 

3.) Chief Financial Officer

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Essential Duties and Responsibilities


	Develops the organization’s long-term financial strategies.
	Oversees budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning.
	Advises the CEO and board on financial risks and opportunities.
	Ensures accurate and timely financial statements.
	Oversees compliance with accounting standards.
	Ensures adherence to tax regulations and statutory requirements.
	Performs internal audits to assess the organization's financial procedures, identify risks, and ensure compliance with relevant regulations and standards.
	Ensuring compliance with relevant laws, regulations, and accounting principles, including tax laws and financial reporting standards.
	Preparing and filing tax returns, maintaining tax records, and providing tax planning advice to minimize tax liabilities while ensuring compliance with tax laws.
	Leads and supervises the finance and accounting teams.
	Fosters a culture of accountability and financial discipline.
	Works with other departments to achieve the overall objectives of the organisation.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting or related courses from a reputable educational institution
	A minimum of 10 years of experience with at least 5 years in a Chief Financial Officer Role.
	Knowledgeable in the use of ERP like Quickbooks, Sage, Zoho, SAP etc.
	Outstanding organizational and time management skills
	Familiarity with office gadgets and applications.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Ability to use discretion and maintain confidentiality.
	Membership of ICAN, ACCA etc is required.
	Applicants residing within the mainland axis and environs are preferred.


Application Closing Date: 15th June, 2026.

Click here to apply online

     

    

        Click here to Apply
